scripts.backend:check: npm run python:env:check && PYTHONPATH=python_backend .venv/bin/python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'python_backend'); import hyba_genesis_api.main; print('backend import ok')"
scripts.benchmark:ai-capabilities: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_ai_capability_benchmarks.py -q -s
scripts.benchmark:capabilities: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_mining_capability_benchmarks.py tests/test_ai_capability_benchmarks.py -q -s
scripts.benchmark:post-quantum: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_post_quantum_benchmark.py -v --tb=short -s
scripts.build: VITE_BUILD_SYSTEM=rollup vite build --config vite.config.build.ts && npx esbuild ./src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=dist/server.mjs
scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs').then(fs => fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.elevation:full: npm run python:env:check && npm run test:unified:engine && npm run test:unified:api && npm run test:mining:doctor && npm run test:pool:profiles && npm run test:metal:sha256 && npm run test:phi:golden-flow && npm run test:pulvini:folding && npm run test:post-quantum && npm run elevation:millennium && npm run elevation:phi && npm run elevation:metal && npm run elevation:runtime && npm run elevation:share:e2e
scripts.funding:elevation:gate: npm run funding:gate && npm run elevation:full
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && npm run lint:eslint && npm run format:check
scripts.prod:command-room:gate: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 scripts/mining_production_readiness_doctor.py --mode command-room && npm run prod:pool:profiles:ready
scripts.prod:live:gate: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 scripts/mining_production_readiness_doctor.py --mode live && npm run prod:pool:profiles:live
scripts.prod:mining:live:ready: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 scripts/mining_production_readiness_doctor.py --mode live && npm run prod:pool:profiles:live
scripts.prod:mining:ready: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 scripts/mining_production_readiness_doctor.py --mode command-room && npm run prod:pool:profiles:ready
scripts.prod:mining:ready:skip-build: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 scripts/mining_production_readiness_doctor.py --mode command-room --skip-build && npm run prod:pool:profiles:ready
scripts.prod:pool:profiles:live: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 scripts/check_pool_profile_job_flow.py --mode live
scripts.prod:pool:profiles:ready: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 scripts/check_pool_profile_job_flow.py --mode prepare
scripts.review:evidence:gate: npm run review:nodus:gate && npm run review:manifest:gate && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest hyba_intelligence_tests -q
scripts.review:manifest:gate: python3 -m pytest tests/test_claim_evidence_manifest.py tests/test_validation_claim_tiers.py tests/test_no_merge_conflict_markers.py -q && npm run review:claim-tiers
scripts.test:adaptive:science: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_adaptive_behavior_deep_analysis.py tests/test_emergent_complexity_iit.py tests/test_iit_runtime_properties.py tests/test_pulvini_autonomics.py tests/test_adaptive_science_claim_gate.py tests/test_scientific_baselines.py tests/test_consciousness_evidence_packet.py tests/test_millennium_runtime_elevation_packet.py tests/test_phi_resonance_elevation_properties.py tests/test_phi_resonance_elevation_packet.py tests/test_apple_silicon_metal_gate.py tests/test_intelligence_endpoints_evidence_first.py tests/test_hendrix_phi_solver_core.py tests/test_stratum_share_acceptance_e2e.py tests/test_phi_unified_mining_engine.py tests/test_unified_mining_api_surface.py tests/test_mining_production_readiness_doctor.py tests/test_pool_profiles_live_cutover.py tests/test_metal_sha256_pipeline.py tests/test_golden_ratio_scaling.py tests/test_phi_architecture_golden_flow.py tests/test_pulvini_phi_memory_folding_optimizations.py tests/test_post_quantum_benchmark.py -q
scripts.test:all: npm run test:property && npm run test:backend && npm run test:bridge
scripts.test:autonomy: npm run test:autonomy:fabric && npm run test:autonomy:ui
scripts.test:autonomy:fabric: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_autonomy_fabric_contract.py -q
scripts.test:backend: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py"
scripts.test:deployment: npm run test:deployment:e2e && npm run test:deployment:property
scripts.test:deployment:e2e: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m unittest tests.test_live_deployment_e2e -v
scripts.test:deployment:property: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_live_deployment_properties.py -v -x --tb=short
scripts.test:e2e:backend: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 scripts/run_backend_e2e.py
scripts.test:e2e:frontend: npx playwright install --with-deps && npx playwright test
scripts.test:elevation:metal: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_apple_silicon_metal_gate.py -q
scripts.test:elevation:millennium: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_millennium_runtime_elevation_packet.py -q
scripts.test:elevation:phi: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_phi_resonance_elevation_properties.py tests/test_phi_resonance_elevation_packet.py -q
scripts.test:elevation:runtime: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_runtime_elevation_trace_packet.py -q
scripts.test:elevation:suite: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_elevation_suite.py -q
scripts.test:evidence:first: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_intelligence_endpoints_evidence_first.py -q
scripts.test:final: npm run test:go-live && npm run test:all && npm run test:e2e:backend && npm run test:deployment
scripts.test:frontend:all: npm run lint:all && npm run test:frontend:unit && npm run test:frontend:components && npm run test:frontend:e2e
scripts.test:frontend:coverage: npm run test:frontend:unit:coverage && npm run test:frontend:components:coverage
scripts.test:frontend:gate: npm run test:frontend:all && npm run build
scripts.test:frontier:experiments: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_frontier_experiment_1_qmc.py tests/test_frontier_experiment_2_qfi.py tests/test_frontier_experiment_3_topo.py tests/test_frontier_experiment_4_golden_sld.py -q
scripts.test:funding:gate: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_funding_engine_deployment_gate.py tests/test_mining_innovation_properties.py tests/test_mining_benefit_assessment.py -q
scripts.test:go-live: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_go_live_final_coverage.py -q
scripts.test:golden:ratio: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_golden_ratio_scaling.py tests/test_phi_architecture_golden_flow.py tests/test_pulvini_phi_memory_folding_optimizations.py -q
scripts.test:hendrix:core: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_hendrix_phi_solver_core.py -q
scripts.test:integration-fence: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_frontend_backend_contracts.py tests/test_pool_handshake_contract.py tests/test_frontend_backend_e2e.py tests/test_runtime_e2e_flow.py -v --tb=short
scripts.test:metal:sha256: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_metal_sha256_pipeline.py -q
scripts.test:mining:benefit: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_mining_benefit_assessment.py -q
scripts.test:mining:doctor: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_mining_production_readiness_doctor.py tests/test_pool_profiles_live_cutover.py -q
scripts.test:mining:innovation: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_mining_innovation_properties.py -q
scripts.test:phi:framing: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_golden_ratio_scaling.py -q
scripts.test:phi:golden-flow: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_phi_architecture_golden_flow.py -q
scripts.test:pool:profiles: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_pool_profiles_live_cutover.py -q
scripts.test:post-quantum: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_post_quantum_benchmark.py -v --tb=short
scripts.test:proofs: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_proof_surfaces_api.py tests/test_autonomy_fabric_contract.py -q
scripts.test:property: npm run test:property:backend && npm run test:property:frontend
scripts.test:property:backend: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_property_based_backend.py -v -x --tb=short
scripts.test:property:frontend: npx vitest run tests/test_property_frontend.test.ts tests/test_governance_signals.test.ts tests/test_apiClient_authInterceptor.test.ts tests/test_apiClient_core.test.ts tests/test_frontend_components.test.tsx tests/test_frontend_backend_e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:pulvini:folding: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_pulvini_phi_memory_folding_optimizations.py -q
scripts.test:share:e2e: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_stratum_share_acceptance_e2e.py -q
scripts.test:subscriber-boundary: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_subscriber_ip_boundary.py tests/test_customer_portal_api.py -q
scripts.test:unified:api: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_unified_mining_api_surface.py -q
scripts.test:unified:engine: npm run python:env:check && cross-env PYTHONPATH=python_backend python3 -m pytest tests/test_phi_unified_mining_engine.py -q
